{"id":"project-LICHEN-ug8i","title":"Router.neighbor_coords and neighbor_queue_depth grow unbounded","description":"file: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py:358-363

Router.neighbor_coords and neighbor_queue_depth dicts grow without bound. update_neighbor_coords (line 627-631) and update_neighbor_queue_depth (line 633-637) add entries but have no removal/eviction mechanism.

On long-running nodes with many transient neighbors, these dicts accumulate stale entries. Unlike the ForwardingBuffer which has LRU eviction, neighbor state has no cleanup.

Suggested fix: Either add LRU eviction when a max neighbor count is reached, or add a neighbor_timeout that removes entries not refreshed within a time window.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T17:02:27.599934Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T17:02:27.599962Z"}

new_value: bounded Router.neighbor_coords and pending_queue with maxlen, 3x ruff
